brand.name: VELUM
brand.tagline: Unveil the value of your treasures

onboarding.pitch: Unveil the value of your treasures
onboarding.pitchDetail: Photograph a wine, a coin, a painting, a stamp or a watch: VELUM identifies it, analyses it and estimates its value from real price sources.
onboarding.seniorMessage: Would you prefer large buttons and bigger text? You can change this anytime in your profile.

auth.resetSent: Reset email sent. Check your inbox.
auth.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.demoHint: Review demo account: demo@velum.app (password provided in the review notes)
auth.confirmEmail: Account created. Confirm your email address, then sign in.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
auth.appleUnavailable: Sign in with Apple is not available on this device.
auth.googleUnavailable: Google sign-in is not available right now.

capture.title: What would you like to appraise?
capture.guideHint: Frame the area well, in full light, without glare.
capture.cameraPermissionMessage: Allow camera access to photograph your objects.
capture.cameraDeniedWeb: Camera access denied — use your phone's camera app instead.
capture.fileHint: Import a CSV or JSON inventory — each row becomes an identification lead.
capture.fileParseError: Unreadable file: check the CSV or JSON format.
capture.noInput: Add at least one photo, some text or a file.

candidates.title: Identified candidates
candidates.reported: Thank you, your report helps us improve.
candidates.needsAssisted: Uncertain identification — complete the information below.
candidates.emptyMessage: Try another photo or use assisted entry.

item.recentSalesIntro: Comparable sales actually observed, attributed to their source.
item.chartNeedsMore: History will appear after several estimates.
item.defaultDisclaimer: Indicative estimate based on public sources — this is neither an expert appraisal nor an authentication.
item.editQueued: Offline: change saved locally, it will be synchronised.
item.alertSet: Alert saved: you will be notified above {{value}}.
item.exportError: Export is not possible right now.

art.expertiseRecommended: Human expert appraisal recommended before any transaction.

stamp.valueCoefficientHint: vs reference value (mint never hinged, perfect centering)
stamp.regummingRisk: Weak signal: suspect gum on a never-hinged stamp — possible regumming to verify.

boxPapers.full_set: Full set — original box and papers

collection.title: My collection
collection.emptyMessage: Capture your first object to unveil its value.

market.title: Market
market.alertsEmpty: No active alerts. Create one from an object sheet.
market.marketplaceSoon: Buy and sell between collectors — coming soon.
market.communityBody: Transactions between collectors, in full confidentiality — no one exchanges contact details, everything goes through the platform in escrow. Tapered commission based on your activity (5% to start, down to 2% for the most active sellers); above €500, an expert appraisal is required at the seller's charge.

profile.title: Profile
profile.seniorModeHint: Large buttons, bigger text, stronger contrast.
profile.deleteAccountMessage: All your data (objects, photos, history) will be permanently erased.
profile.deleteAccountConfirmMessage: This action is irreversible. Confirm permanent deletion?

paywall.title: VELUM plans
paywall.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your collection.

free.name: Free
free.features: 5 scans per week for EACH module (Wine, Coins, Paintings, Stamps) · analysis sheet and estimate

premium.name: Premium
premium.features: Unlimited scans across all 4 modules · PDF/CSV exports · price alerts — without the virtual book

paywall.purchaseDone: Thank you! Your subscription is active.
paywall.purchaseError: Purchase is not possible right now.
paywall.unavailable: Purchases are not available in this environment (Expo Go / web). Plans are shown for information only.
paywall.legal: Auto-renewing subscription, cancellable anytime from your App Store or Google Play account. Prices include VAT.

gold.name: Gold
gold.features: Everything in Premium + virtual book: wine cellar with slot locations, coin table, gallery, stamp album · cellar sommelier (which wine from MY cellar for tonight's dish?)

platine.name: Platinum
platine.features: Everything: book valued CONTINUOUSLY against live market transactions · insurance/estate report · collectors community (anonymous matchmaking, transactions through the platform only — tapered commission from 5% down to 2% based on your activity, expert appraisal required above €500, at the seller's charge)

export.disclaimer: Indicative estimate generated by VELUM — this document is neither an expert appraisal nor an authentication.
export.insuranceIntro: This report presents the estimated value of the listed objects, at the stated date, for insurance or estate information purposes.
export.methodology: Estimates are produced by the VELUM valuation engine (§7): currency normalisation to EUR, weighting of observations by recency (1-year half-life) and source reliability, outlier rejection (MAD), weighted median and 80% / 95% confidence intervals via bootstrap, together with a reliability score.

errors.NO_OBSERVATIONS: Not enough price data to estimate this object.
errors.RECOGNITION_FAILED: Identification failed — try another photo or assisted entry.
errors.ANALYSIS_FAILED: Analysis failed. Please try again shortly.
errors.SOURCE_UNAVAILABLE: Service temporarily unavailable. Try again later.
errors.INVALID_INPUT: Invalid input — check the information you entered.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests — please wait a moment.
errors.BUDGET_EXCEEDED: Weekly scan quota reached for this module — upgrade your plan.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.offline: You appear to be offline. Your changes will be synchronised.
errors.PLAN_REQUIRED: This feature belongs to a higher plan.

carnet.title: My book
carnet.upsellMessage: The virtual book is part of the Gold plan: wine cellar with slot locations, coin cabinet, gallery, stamp album and watch box.
carnet.upgradePlatine: Upgrade to Platinum for continuous valuation
carnet.movePlaceholder: e.g. Rack B3, safe, living room…
carnet.emptyDomainMessage: Scan your first objects to fill this book.

blind.title: Blind tasting
blind.intro: Draw bottles from your cellar at random and challenge your friends — anonymous cards, hidden answers, printable sheet.
blind.needsMore: You need at least {{min}} bottles in your cellar to run a blind tasting.
blind.printHint: Generates a PDF with the cards and a separate answers page
blind.printError: Couldn't generate the sheet right now.
blind.exportError: Couldn't generate the sheet right now.
blind.exportWebHint: Use your browser's print preview to save the PDF.
blind.sheetIntro: One card per wine, served in a shuffled order. Note your impressions, then turn to the answers page.
blind.sheetDisclaimer: Playful sheet generated by VELUM from your cellar — hints are indicative.

cellar.search: Find the wine in my cellar
cellar.searching: The sommelier is browsing your cellar…
cellar.noResult: No wine in your cellar is a true match for this dish.
cellar.planRequired: The cellar sommelier is part of the virtual book — Gold or Platinum plan.
cellar.drinkNowTitle: {{count}} wine(s) at their peak — drink now
cellar.emptyCellar: Your cellar is empty: scan your first bottles to activate the sommelier.

cellarShare.hint: Generates a read-only PDF snapshot of your cellar
cellarShare.error: Couldn't generate the snapshot right now.
cellarShare.webHint: Use your browser's print preview to save the PDF.
cellarShare.title: My cellar — VELUM
cellarShare.intro: Read-only snapshot at a point in time: no account access, no edits possible.
cellarShare.disclaimer: Values estimated for information by VELUM — neither an appraisal nor authentication.

seriesGaps.title: Series gaps
seriesGaps.subtitle: Missing years to complete your series.

event.title: Event sommelier
event.intro: Compose your menu: for each course, VELUM suggests the best pairing from your cellar.
event.composing: The sommelier is composing your menu…

journal.tastingEmpty: No notes yet — record your impressions as you taste.
journal.notePlaceholder: e.g. garrigue on the nose, silky tannins…
journal.acquiredFromPlaceholder: e.g. auction house, gallery, gift, inheritance…

community.title: Community
community.intro: Buy and sell between collectors, in full confidentiality. Payment is held in escrow until receipt; the commission is only taken once the sale completes.
community.planRequired: The community is part of the Platinum plan.
community.escrowHint: Payment is held until you confirm receipt
community.disputeOpened: Dispute opened — the platform will arbitrate.
community.sellHint: Items ≥ €500 require an appraisal before listing (at the seller's charge).

aiConsent.title: Artificial-intelligence analysis
aiConsent.body: To identify and value your items, VELUM sends your photos and descriptions to a third-party AI service (visual analysis). Photos are never used for anything else. You may decline: manual entry and file import remain available.
aiConsent.declinedBanner: Without AI consent, photo and text analysis are disabled. Use file import — change this in Profile.

calibration.inProgressHint: {{count}} prediction(s) checked against realized prices — proof shows at 30.

arbiter.title: Arbiter: drink, hold or sell?
arbiter.planRequired: The estate arbiter is part of the virtual book — Gold or Platine plan.
arbiter.sellWindow: Exit window: peak closing soon AND established trend.
arbiter.disclaimerIndicative: Indicative signal based on your book — never investment advice nor an appraisal.
arbiter.disclaimerOwner: You remain the sole decision-maker: nothing is triggered automatically.
